title: Bionano Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Results and Provides Revenue Outlook for 2026
text: Bionano reported total revenue of $8.0 million in the fourth quarter, down 3% year-over-year. The company sold 7,554 nanochannel array flowcells and installed 9 new optical genome mapping (OGM) systems, bringing the installed base to 387 units—a 4% increase from the prior year quarter. Gross margin improved to 43% compared to 42% in Q4 2024. Operating expenses decreased significantly, with GAAP operating expenses down 22% to $11.9 million. Annual revenue totaled $28.5 million, representing a 7% decrease from $30.8 million in 2024. However, consumables and software revenues increased 7%, offset by discontinued clinical services that contributed $1.7 million the prior year. The company achieved a 46% gross margin for 2025 versus just 1% in 2024—a dramatic improvement. Operating expenses fell 55% to $46.5 million. Bionano ended the year with $29.6 million in cash and investments. Management provided guidance expecting Q1 2026 revenue between $6.5 and $6.7 million, with full-year 2026 revenue guidance of $30 to $33 million.
